# Nivaa Stays

> Nivaa Stays is a premium 2-room guest house near Pondicherry Gate, about 5 minutes (~1.5 km) from JIPMER hospital in Puducherry (Pondicherry), India. Tagline: "Le Affordable Luxury." Both rooms have a private spa bathtub — one of the very few bathtub stays in Pondicherry. Direct booking by WhatsApp/phone; rates from ₹2,000/night.

## Key facts
- Name: Nivaa Stays
- Type: Premium guest house — 2 rooms, both with a private bathtub
- Location: 13, Saibaba Koil Street, Puducherry 605009, India — near Pondicherry Gate, ~5 min / 1.5 km from JIPMER
- Best for: JIPMER patient families, students & parents (admissions / exams), conference & medical visitors, couples and small families visiting Pondicherry
- Rates (per night, approx): Weekday ₹2,000 · Weekend ₹2,500 · Long weekend ₹3,000 · direct-booking code NIVAA10 for 10% off
- Google rating: 4.8
- Amenities: private bathtub, free parking, Wi-Fi, AC, home-cooked meals, pet-friendly (charge applies)
- Contact: +91 96203 64554 (call / WhatsApp) · nivaastays@gmail.com
